queries: ("Breast Neoplasms"[mh] OR breast cancer[tiab] OR "breast neoplasm*"[tiab] OR "mammary carcinoma*"[tiab] OR "breast tumor*"[tiab] OR "breast tumour*"[tiab]) AND ("Microbiota"[mh] OR "Microbiome"[mh] OR microbiom*[tiab] OR microbiot*[tiab] OR "intratumoral microbiota"[tiab] OR "tumor microbiome"[tiab] OR "tumour microbiome"[tiab]) AND (tissue[tiab] OR "tumor tissue"[tiab] OR "tumour tissue"[tiab] OR "breast tissue"[tiab] OR intratumor*[tiab] OR FFPE[tiab] OR "formalin-fixed"[tiab] OR "fresh-frozen"[tiab])

(("Triple Negative Breast Neoplasms"[mh] OR "triple-negative"[tiab] OR TNBC[tiab]) AND ("non-triple-negative"[tiab] OR "non-TNBC"[tiab] OR "hormone receptor-positive"[tiab] OR "ER-positive"[tiab] OR "PR-positive"[tiab] OR "HER2-positive"[tiab] OR "luminal A"[tiab] OR "luminal B"[tiab] OR "HER2-enriched"[tiab])) AND ("Breast Neoplasms"[mh] OR breast cancer[tiab]) AND ((("Microbiota"[mh] OR "Microbiome"[mh] OR microbiom*[tiab] OR microbiot*[tiab] OR "intratumoral microbiota"[tiab] OR "tumor microbiome"[tiab]) AND (composition[tiab] OR "alpha-diversity"[tiab] OR "beta-diversity"[tiab] OR "differential abundance"[tiab] OR enrichment[tiab] OR taxa[tiab] OR genera[tiab] OR species[tiab] OR "functional pathway*"[tiab] OR "metabolic pathway*"[tiab] OR "Metabolic Networks and Pathways"[mh] OR inflammation[tiab] OR "Inflammation"[mh] OR proliferation[tiab] OR "Cell Proliferation"[mh] OR invasion[tiab] OR "Neoplasm Invasiveness"[mh] OR metastasis[tiab] OR "Neoplasm Metastasis"[mh])) OR (Azospirillum[tiab] OR "Gemmiger formicilis"[tiab] OR Gemmiger[tiab] OR "Anaerobutyricum soehngenii"[tiab] OR "Eubacterium hallii"[tiab]))

(("Breast Neoplasms"[mh] OR breast cancer[tiab]) AND (TNBC[tiab] OR "triple-negative"[tiab] OR "Triple Negative Breast Neoplasms"[mh]) AND ("Microbiota"[mh] OR microbiom*[tiab] OR microbiot*[tiab]) AND (tissue[tiab] OR intratumor*[tiab] OR "tumor tissue"[tiab])) AND (("High-Throughput Nucleotide Sequencing"[mh] OR "RNA, Ribosomal, 16S"[mh]) OR ("16S"[tiab] OR "16S rRNA"[tiab] OR amplicon[tiab] OR metagenom*[tiab] OR shotgun[tiab] OR metatranscriptom*[tiab])) AND ("Cohort Studies"[mh] OR "Case-Control Studies"[mh] OR "Cross-Sectional Studies"[mh] OR cohort[tiab] OR "case-control"[tiab] OR "cross-sectional"[tiab] OR multicenter[tiab] OR comparative[tiab] OR observational[tiab])

("Breast Neoplasms"[mh] OR breast cancer[tiab]) AND ("tumor microenvironment"[tiab] OR intratumor*[tiab] OR "tumor tissue"[tiab] OR "breast tissue"[tiab]) AND ("Microbiota"[mh] OR microbiom*[tiab] OR "intratumoral microbiota"[tiab] OR "tumor microbiome"[tiab]) AND (subtype*[tiab] OR "molecular subtype*"[tiab] OR TNBC[tiab] OR "triple-negative"[tiab] OR "ER-positive"[tiab] OR "PR-positive"[tiab] OR "HER2-positive"[tiab] OR luminal[tiab])

(("Breast Neoplasms/microbiology"[mh] OR ("Breast Neoplasms"[mh] AND ("Microbiota"[mh] OR "Microbiome"[mh]))) AND ("Triple Negative Breast Neoplasms"[mh] OR "Receptor, ErbB-2"[mh] OR "Receptors, Estrogen"[mh] OR "Receptors, Progesterone"[mh])) AND ("Metabolic Networks and Pathways"[mh] OR "Inflammation"[mh] OR "Cell Proliferation"[mh] OR "Neoplasm Invasiveness"[mh] OR "Neoplasm Metastasis"[mh])

inclusion_criteria: Population: Human breast cancer patients with tumor tissue samples, including clearly classified TNBC and non-TNBC groups.

Study design: Original observational studies (cross-sectional, case-control, or cohort) that profile the tumor/tissue-resident microbiome using sequencing-based methods (e.g., 16S rRNA gene sequencing, shotgun metagenomics, metatranscriptomics).
Comparator: Includes a non-TNBC breast cancer tissue group as the control/comparator to TNBC within the same study.

Outcomes: Reports microbial community composition differences and/or differential abundance of taxa (including, but not limited to, Azospirillum, Gemmiger formicilis, Anaerobutyricum soehngenii) and/or functional pathway analyses related to chronic inflammation, cellular proliferation, invasion, or metastasis.
exclusion_criteria: Non-human, in vitro/cell line-only studies, or non-original publications (reviews, editorials); conference abstracts without full data.
Studies not analyzing tumor/tissue microbiome via sequencing (e.g., stool-only, blood-only, saliva-only, culture-only, or non-microbiome assays).
No TNBC versus non-TNBC comparison or unclear breast cancer subtype classification.
Do not report microbiome community composition, differential abundance, or functional pathway outcomes relevant to the review question.
screening_criteria.description: Screening criteria for original human studies comparing tumor tissue microbiome between TNBC and non-TNBC breast cancer, using sequencing-based profiling and reporting composition, differential taxa (including specified genera/species), and/or functional pathway involvement in inflammation, proliferation, invasion, or metastasis.
